Invalid node-authored response: node-authored response was not valid JSON. Raw response excerpt: {
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "The problem asks for the minimum Hamming weight of the product 2023 * n. This is equivalent to finding the minimum number of ones in the binary representation of a multiple of 2023. Since 2023 is odd, this is equivalent to finding the smallest k such that there exists an n where 2023 * n has k ones. This is related to the order of 2 in the multiplicative group modulo 20...
